examples: He firmly believes liberty is inseparable from social justice.
Emotions are an essential and inseparable part of our consciousness.
One of the implications of the intuitive style of executive management is that "thinking" is inseparable from acting.
Aoki, a former Olympic wrestler from Tokyo, was inseparable from the Benihana (No. 123) name.
To what extent is the useful vitality of that detail inseparable from its historical reality?
